description: The entity demonstrates a commitment to attract, develop, and retain competent individuals in alignment with objectives.

subcriteria.name: background_checks
subcriteria.reference_text: Background check policy requiring pre-employment screening for all new hires, contractors, and vendor employees. Checks include criminal history, employment verification, and education verification. Performed by a third-party screening provider like Checkr or Sterling.

subcriteria.name: security_training
subcriteria.reference_text: Annual security awareness training required for all employees. Training covers phishing, password hygiene, data handling, and incident reporting. Completion tracked with dates and employee names in a training platform like KnowBe4, Curricula, or the company LMS. Completion rate reported.

subcriteria.name: performance_evaluation
subcriteria.reference_text: Annual performance reviews conducted for all employees. Evaluations assess competency against job requirements and objectives. Action plans created for shortcomings. Reviews signed by both manager and employee.

subcriteria.name: hiring_process
subcriteria.reference_text: Job requirements documented in job descriptions. Candidates evaluated against defined requirements during interview process. Technical competency assessed for security and engineering roles.

mismatch_signals.reason: Technical access controls are not evidence of personnel competency programs.
Benefits administration is not competency or training evidence.
